2605.19833.title: Mega-ASR: Towards In-the-wild^2 Speech Recognition via Scaling up Real-world Acoustic Simulation
2605.19833.paper_summary: Despite rapid advances in automatic speech recognition (ASR) and large audio-language models, robust recognition in real-world environments remains limited by an "acoustic robustness bottleneck": models often lose acoustic grounding and produce omissions or hallucinations under severe, compositional distortions. We propose Mega-ASR, a unified ASR-in-the-wild framework that combines scalable compound-data construction with progressive acoustic-to-semantic optimization. We introduce Voices-in-the-Wild-2M, covering 7 classic acoustic phenomena and 54 physically plausible compound scenarios, and train Mega-ASR with Acoustic-to-Semantic Progressive Supervised Fine-Tuning and Dual-Granularity WER-Gated Policy Optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Mega-ASR achieves significant advantages over prior state-of-the-art systems on adverse-condition ASR benchmarks (45.69% vs. 54.01% on VOiCES R4-B-F, and 21.49% vs. 29.34% on NOIZEUS Sta-0). On complex compositional acoustic scenarios, Mega-ASR further delivers over 30% relative WER reduction against strong open- and closed-source baselines, establishing a scalable paradigm for robust ASR in-the-wild.
2605.19833.paper_summary_zh: 儘管自動語音識別（ASR）和大型音頻語言模型迅速進步，但在現實環境中的穩健識別仍然受到「聲學穩健性瓶頸」的限制：模型在嚴重的組合失真下經常失去聲學基礎，並產生遺漏或幻覺。我們提出了Mega-ASR，一個統一的ASR-in-the-wild框架，結合了可擴展的複合數據構建與漸進的聲學到語義優化。我們介紹了Voices-in-the-Wild-2M，涵蓋7種經典聲學現象和54種物理上合理的複合場景，並使用聲學到語義漸進監督微調和雙粒度WER門控策略優化來訓練Mega-ASR。大量實驗表明，Mega-ASR在不利條件的ASR基準上相較於先前的最先進系統取得了顯著優勢（在VOiCES R4-B-F上為45.69%對54.01%，在NOIZEUS Sta-0上為21.49%對29.34%）。在複雜的組合聲學場景中，Mega-ASR進一步實現了相對WER減少超過30%的效果，相較於強大的開源和閉源基準，建立了一個可擴展的穩健ASR在野外的範式。
2605.19833.author: Zhifei Xie et.al.
2605.19833.authors: Zhifei Xie, Kaiyu Pang, Haobin Zhang, Deheng Ye, Xiaobin Hu, Shuicheng Yan, Chunyan Miao
